senses.gloss: a fabric made of satin or velvet (which might be a blanket or a carpet or a person’s dress)
a kind of fritter or cheburek, qatayef (chiefly found in the plural قَطَائِف (qaṭāʔif), and in its vulgar form قَطَايِف (qaṭāyif))

etymology.text: From the root ق ط ف (q ṭ f), of which قَطَفَ (qaṭafa, “to pluck”), therefore perhaps originally meaning piled cloth.
